name: Song of Heroic Lands User Guide

text.content:
Welcome to the Song of Heroic Lands system for Foundry VTT. This system has been designed to be compatible with HârnMaster: Roleplaying in the World of Kethira (HMK) system by Kelestia Productions, Inc. (https://www.kelestia.com/). You may either use the [[Song_of_Heroic_Lands_Rules|abbreviated SoHL rules]] or you may purchase the HMK book (I heartily recommend that).

This page is an index to the instructions on how to use this system.

If you want to just jump in, take a look at the [[SoHL_Quickstart]]
